rationale.rules-based-checks: Deterministic scanners enforce publish-time security policies on generated artifacts.
rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Analyzes an AI-coded leak and contributes an operational vulnerability taxonomy.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Findings provide severity, location, CWE, and self-contained remediation guidance.
rationale.framework: Reusable modular security-gate architecture integrates at CI and publication boundaries.
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented VibeGuard and evaluated its working scanners and policies.
rationale.agentic: Targets wholesale AI-authored projects and artifacts reviewed at publication gates.
rationale.risk-security: Contributes and evaluates mitigations for security vulnerabilities in AI-generated code.
